Body.Content:
You can now switch between accounts on the Copilot tab. Simply swipe left to open the the left-navigation and select from the list of supported accounts.

GA date: September CY2025

Body.Content:
You can now switch between accounts on the Copilot tab. Simply swipe left to open the the left-navigation and select from the list of supported accounts. Updated June 9, 2026: We have decided not to move forward with this change at this time. We apologize for any inconvenience.

GA date: September CY2025
